items.claim: Shara Magomedov has improved his skills since his last fight.
items.quote: I think he leveled up. I think that fight only made him better.

items.claim: Rafael Fiziev has a poor recent record of 1 win and 4 losses in his last five fights.
items.quote: He's 1 and 4 of his last five

items.claim: Rafael Fiziev is a technical striker with effective body and low kicks.
items.quote: He's technical, beautiful body kicks, low kicks

items.claim: Rafael Fiziev is prone to facial bruising and cuts during fights.
items.quote: Fiziev, you can see it right now, he can get bruised up very easily. He can get bruised up very easily around under the eyes or cut up.
